    Orch.\ (Fine) & Router & $0.650$ & $0.654$ & n.s. & -0.02 (negligible) \\
    Orch.\ (Fine) & Swarm & $0.650$ & $0.668$ & n.s. & -0.02 (negligible) \\
    Orch.\ (Coarse) & Router & $0.606$ & $0.654$ & $^{*}$ & -0.05 (negligible) \\
    Orch.\ (Coarse) & Swarm & $0.606$ & $0.668$ & $^{***}$ & -0.06 (negligible) \\
    Router & Swarm & $0.654$ & $0.668$ & n.s. & -0.01 (negligible) \\
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
  \vspace{2pt}
  \par\footnotesize{$^{*}$\,$p<0.05$, $^{**}$\,$p<0.01$, $^{***}$\,$p<0.001$, n.s.\,= nicht signifikant. Cliff's $\delta$: $<0.147$ negligible, $<0.33$ small, $<0.474$ medium, $\geq 0.474$ large.}
\end{table}
